remaining_params.SpellDescription: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each mana from a Treasure that was spent to cast this spell. Then that creature deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.
remaining_params.StackDescription: {c:ThisTargetedCard} gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each mana from a Treasure that was spent to cast this spell.
